state_manifold.state_type: PACKETS of central idempotents over Z(Q[PSL2(Z/72Z)]) (backend-relative)
state_manifold.embedding_function: Consume a certified center-algebra backend (QA_CONGRUENCE_CENTER_ALGEBRA_CERT.v1 with profile=full_backend). Interpret each packet element as a sparse rational coefficient vector in the PSL2(Z/72Z) orbit basis. Verify idempotence, orthogonality, and completeness by exact orbit-basis multiplication via the backend engine.
constraints: This family is strictly backend-relative: it does not introduce or certify character tables.
All arithmetic is exact (int, Fraction); no floats.
Basis is fixed: psl2_mod72_orbit_basis as defined by qa_psl2_mod72_center_algebra.py and certified by QA_CONGRUENCE_CENTER_ALGEBRA_CERT.v1 (full_backend).

invariants.name: packet_idempotence
invariants.definition: Each element e_i satisfies e_i^2 = e_i in the center algebra.

invariants.name: packet_orthogonality
invariants.definition: For i≠j, e_i e_j = 0 in the center algebra.

invariants.name: packet_completeness
invariants.definition: Sum_i e_i = 1 (the algebra identity) in the center algebra.

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_id mismatch or missing required fields
Dependency backend cert is not profile=full_backend
Dependency cert hash does not match
Dependency backend cert does not validate
Invalid sparse vectors (out of range indices, duplicate indices, non-normalized rationals)
Optional target element z does not equal the claimed linear combination of packet elements
Recomputed packet fingerprint does not match

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: All parsing is deterministic, backend multiplication is exact, and hashes use canonical JSON serialization (sort_keys, fixed separators).
